proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher ECOG performance status (ecog_ps=2 vs ecog_ps=0) is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Patients with stage_iv=1 have shorter pfs_months than patients with stage_iv=0.
Patients with has_brain_mets=1 have shorter pfs_months than patients with has_brain_mets=0.
Female patients (sex_female=1) have different pfs_months than male patients.

analyses.result_summary: PFS by ECOG: mean PFS ECOG0=4.33, ECOG1=3.19, ECOG2=2.15; ECOG2 - ECOG0 = -2.17 months, Welch p=0.00e+00
PFS in stage IV (2.92) vs non-stage IV (4.36); diff=-1.44 mo, p=0.00e+00
PFS with brain mets (2.74) vs without (3.66); diff=-0.92 mo, p=0.00e+00
PFS in females vs males: diff=-0.20 mo, p=7.70e-25

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients receiving treatment_pembrolizumab have longer pfs_months than those who do not, on average.
Patients receiving treatment_sotorasib have longer pfs_months than those who do not, on average.
Patients receiving treatment_olaparib have longer pfs_months than those who do not, on average.
Patients receiving treatment_osimertinib have longer pfs_months than those who do not, on average.

analyses.result_summary: PFS on treatment_pembrolizumab=3.41 vs off=3.45; diff=-0.03 mo, p=8.11e-02
PFS on treatment_sotorasib=3.64 vs off=3.32; diff=0.32 mo, p=5.62e-49
PFS on treatment_olaparib=3.41 vs off=3.44; diff=-0.02 mo, p=2.56e-01
PFS on treatment_osimertinib=3.43 vs off=3.43; diff=0.00 mo, p=8.70e-01

proposed_hypotheses.text: egfr_mutation+ patients have different pfs_months than egfr_mutation- patients (overall sample).
kras_g12c+ patients have different pfs_months than kras_g12c- patients (overall sample).
alk_fusion+ patients have shorter pfs_months than alk_fusion- patients (overall sample).
stk11_mutation+ patients have different pfs_months than stk11_mutation- patients (overall sample).
brca2_mutation+ patients have different pfs_months than brca2_mutation- patients (overall sample).
tmb_high+ patients have different pfs_months than tmb_high- patients (overall sample).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher serum albumin_g_dl is associated with longer pfs_months (positive Pearson correlation).
Higher ldh_u_l is associated with shorter pfs_months (negative Pearson correlation).
Higher weight_loss_pct_6mo is associated with shorter pfs_months (negative Pearson correlation).
Higher crp_mg_l is associated with shorter pfs_months (negative Pearson correlation).
Higher nlr (neutrophil-to-lymphocyte ratio) is associated with shorter pfs_months (negative Pearson correlation).
Higher pdl1_tps is associated with longer pfs_months (positive Pearson correlation).
Older age_years is associated with shorter pfs_months (negative Pearson correlation).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Never-smokers (smoking_status='never') have longer pfs_months than current smokers (smoking_status='current').
Patients with adenocarcinoma histology have longer pfs_months than patients with squamous histology.
Hemoglobin_g_dl is correlated with pfs_months.
Liver enzymes (ast_u_l, alt_u_l, total_bilirubin_mg_dl, alkaline_phosphatase_u_l) and renal markers (creatinine_mg_dl, bun_mg_dl) are correlated with pfs_months.

proposed_hypotheses.text: treatment_osimertinib improves pfs_months specifically in egfr_mutation+ patients (positive osimertinib*egfr_mutation interaction on log PFS), with little or no effect in egfr_mutation- patients.
treatment_sotorasib improves pfs_months specifically in kras_g12c+ patients (positive sotorasib*kras_g12c interaction on log PFS), with little or no effect in kras_g12c- patients.
treatment_olaparib improves pfs_months specifically in brca2_mutation+ patients (positive olaparib*brca2_mutation interaction on log PFS), with little or no effect in brca2_mutation- patients.

analyses.result_summary: In egfr_mutation+ (n=6517): treatment_osimertinib on=3.59 vs off=3.60, diff=-0.01 mo, p=8.08e-01
In egfr_mutation- (n=43483): treatment_osimertinib on=3.41 vs off=3.41, diff=0.01 mo, p=8.05e-01

proposed_hypotheses.text: treatment_pembrolizumab improves pfs_months more in pdl1_high (TPS>=0.5) patients than in pdl1_low patients (positive interaction).
treatment_pembrolizumab improves pfs_months more in tmb_high+ patients than in tmb_high- patients (positive interaction).
treatment_pembrolizumab is less effective in stk11_mutation+ patients than in stk11_mutation- patients (negative interaction).
treatment_pembrolizumab is less effective in never-smokers than in ever-smokers (negative interaction with never-smoker status).

proposed_hypotheses.text: After adjustment for all measured features in a multivariable OLS model on log(pfs_months+0.1), age_years, ecog_ps, stage_iv, has_brain_mets, albumin_g_dl, weight_loss_pct_6mo, ldh_u_l, smoking status, histology, kras_g12c, alk_fusion remain independently associated with PFS, while pdl1_tps, tmb_high, egfr_mutation, stk11_mutation, and most chemistries are not.
After adjustment, only treatment_sotorasib retains a positive PFS effect on log scale; treatment_pembrolizumab, treatment_olaparib, and treatment_osimertinib do not.

proposed_hypotheses.text: treatment_pembrolizumab improves pfs_months in the joint subgroup of pdl1_high=1 AND stk11_mutation=0.
treatment_pembrolizumab improves pfs_months in the joint subgroup of pdl1_high=1 AND tmb_high=1.
treatment_pembrolizumab improves pfs_months in the joint subgroup pdl1_high=1 AND tmb_high=1 AND stk11_mutation=0 (the most clinically favorable immunotherapy candidates).
treatment_pembrolizumab effect is suppressed in pdl1_high+ AND stk11_mutation+ (STK11 confers resistance).

Pembrolizumab in PD-L1 high AND STK11+: n=1600; on=3.43 vs off=3.36; diff=0.07 mo, p=4.98e-01

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among all measured features, the strongest treatment-effect modifier of treatment_sotorasib is kras_g12c (consistent with its molecular target), and the second-strongest modifiers include sex_female and age_years.
No measured feature shows a clinically meaningful interaction with treatment_pembrolizumab; the largest interaction p-values per modifier exceed conventional thresholds.
No measured feature shows a clinically meaningful interaction with treatment_olaparib; including the brca2_mutation interaction itself.
No measured feature shows a clinically meaningful interaction with treatment_osimertinib; including the egfr_mutation interaction itself.

proposed_hypotheses.text: A CART regression of treatment_sotorasib's estimated treatment effect (counterfactual: random forest trained on controls) on baseline features identifies a subgroup with very large positive sotorasib effect (>3 mo improvement) and a separate subgroup with no benefit.

CART subgroup analyses for treatment_pembrolizumab, treatment_olaparib, and treatment_osimertinib do NOT reveal subgroups with very large positive treatment effects; the across-leaf range of estimated effects is small.

analyses.result_summary: CART subgroup with largest estimated treatment_sotorasib effect: est_effect=4.591 mo, n=1037
CART subgroup with smallest/most-negative estimated treatment_sotorasib effect: est_effect=-0.460 mo, n=228
CART subgroup with largest estimated treatment_pembrolizumab effect: est_effect=0.730 mo, n=844
CART subgroup with smallest/most-negative estimated treatment_pembrolizumab effect: est_effect=-0.625 mo, n=649
CART subgroup with largest estimated treatment_olaparib effect: est_effect=0.825 mo, n=717
CART subgroup with smallest/most-negative estimated treatment_olaparib effect: est_effect=-0.536 mo, n=522
CART subgroup with largest estimated treatment_osimertinib effect: est_effect=0.615 mo, n=524
CART subgroup with smallest/most-negative estimated treatment_osimertinib effect: est_effect=-0.759 mo, n=256

proposed_hypotheses.text: Within KRAS+ patients, sex_female modifies treatment_sotorasib effect: PFS gain from sotorasib is much larger in male KRAS+ patients than in female KRAS+ patients (negative sotorasib*sex_female interaction within KRAS+).

Within KRAS+ patients, treatment_sotorasib effect on log PFS is also modified by age_years and ecog_ps and has_brain_mets and albumin_g_dl, but the effect size of these modifiers is small relative to sex.
stk11_mutation does NOT meaningfully modify treatment_sotorasib effect within KRAS+ patients (interaction near zero).

analyses.result_summary: In KRAS+ (n=6368): interaction sotorasib*sex_female on log_pfs: coef=-1.1783, p=2.27e-220
Sotorasib in KRAS+ AND sex_female=0: n=3508; on=7.88 vs off=3.23; diff=4.64 mo, p=0.00e+00
Sotorasib in KRAS+ AND sex_female=1: n=2860; on=3.18 vs off=3.19; diff=-0.01 mo, p=8.84e-01

In KRAS+ (n=6368): interaction sotorasib*stk11_mutation on log_pfs: coef=0.0119, p=8.19e-01

Sotorasib in KRAS+ AND STK11=1: n=896; on=5.60 vs off=3.28; diff=2.33 mo, p=3.60e-25

proposed_hypotheses.text: The three-way interaction treatment_sotorasib * kras_g12c * sex_female on log PFS in the full cohort is large and negative, confirming that sotorasib's benefit is concentrated in KRAS+ males.
Within KRAS+ males, treatment_sotorasib gives a substantial PFS benefit (~4.5-4.8 months) that is consistent across ECOG, brain mets, STK11, and age strata.
Within KRAS+ females, treatment_sotorasib confers no PFS benefit across ECOG strata.

proposed_hypotheses.text: FINAL subgroup hypothesis for treatment_sotorasib: treatment_sotorasib improves pfs_months by approximately 4.6 months in patients with kras_g12c=1 AND sex_female=0 (KRAS G12C-positive males); the benefit is essentially absent in kras_g12c=1 AND sex_female=1 (KRAS G12C-positive females) and is essentially absent in kras_g12c=0 patients regardless of sex.

FINAL subgroup hypothesis for treatment_pembrolizumab: no biomarker subgroup (including pdl1_high, tmb_high, stk11_mutation status, smoking status, or any combination of these) yields a clinically or statistically meaningful PFS benefit from treatment_pembrolizumab in this dataset; the adjusted treatment effect on log PFS is approximately 0 (p>0.9).
FINAL subgroup hypothesis for treatment_olaparib: treatment_olaparib does not improve pfs_months even in the brca2_mutation+ subgroup; the olaparib*brca2_mutation interaction is near zero (p~0.97).

FINAL subgroup hypothesis for treatment_osimertinib: treatment_osimertinib does not improve pfs_months even in the egfr_mutation+ subgroup; the osimertinib*egfr_mutation interaction is near zero (p~0.43).

analyses.result_summary: FINAL: Sotorasib improves PFS specifically in KRAS G12C+ AND male patients: n=3508; on=7.88 vs off=3.23; diff=4.64 mo, p=0.00e+00
FINAL: Pembrolizumab adjusted effect on log_pfs: coef=-0.0004, p=9.42e-01; no consistent subgroup with PFS benefit was identified.
Best pembrolizumab subgroup: pdl1_high=1, tmb_high=1, stk11=1, smoking=former; n=212; diff=0.50 mo, p=8.63e-02
Worst pembrolizumab subgroup: pdl1_high=0, tmb_high=1, stk11=0, smoking=never; n=388; diff=-0.49 mo, p=2.02e-02
Pembro in PD-L1 high AND ever-smoker AND STK11- AND ECOG<=1: n=6631; on=3.59 vs off=3.70; diff=-0.11 mo, p=5.02e-02

Best olaparib subgroup (BRCA2+): ecog=0, brain=1, stage_iv=0; n=60; diff=0.56 mo, p=2.58e-01
FINAL: Osimertinib*EGFR interaction on log_pfs: coef=0.0263, p=4.26e-01; no PFS benefit detected even in EGFR+.
Best osimertinib subgroup (EGFR+): ecog=1, brain=1, stage_iv=1; n=506; diff=0.39 mo, p=2.32e-02

Osimertinib in EGFR+ AND smoking=former: n=2237; on=3.62 vs off=3.59; diff=0.03 mo, p=7.89e-01
Osimertinib in EGFR+ AND smoking=current: n=455; on=2.85 vs off=3.10; diff=-0.25 mo, p=2.75e-01
